title: Plan Manifest Schema
description: JSON Schema for validating plan manifest files used in the OpenCode agent pipeline. Validates structural, behavioral, meta, and acceptance checkpoints alongside contract rules.

manifestVersion.description: Version number of the manifest format. Increment when schema-breaking changes are made. Use 1 for initial manifests.

planSummary.description: Brief human-readable description of the overall plan.

createdAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp indicating when the manifest was created.

feature.description: Short identifier or name for the feature being implemented.

phases.description: Number of phases in the implementation roadmap.

estimatedEffort.description: Estimated effort level for the implementation.

riskLevel.description: Estimated risk level for the implementation.

securityConsiderations.description: Security pre-screening results injected before planning. Auto-populated by security-prescreen.ts. Contains risk classification, required scans, and security-specific checkpoints.

riskLevel.description: Risk classification determined by security pre-screening. Maps from standard/sensitive/infrastructure to plan manifest's riskLevel.

inputValidationRequired.description: Whether input validation is required (true for any user-facing feature).

piiHandlingRequired.description: Whether the feature handles personally identifiable information.

encryptionRequired.description: Whether encryption is required for data at rest or in transit.

auditLoggingRequired.description: Whether audit logging of operations is required.

rateLimitingRequired.description: Whether rate limiting is required (e.g., for API endpoints).

summary.description: Human-readable summary of security considerations for the feature.

requiredScans.description: List of security scans that MUST run for this feature.

securityCheckpoints.description: Security-specific checkpoints that supplement the standard checkpoints array.

id.description: Unique identifier following the pattern CP-SEC-NNN.

description.description: Human-readable description of what to verify.

target.description: Relative file path to the file being verified.

verify.description: Verification specification (same structure as standard checkpoint verify).

circuitBreakerThreshold.description: Security-specific circuit breaker thresholds for this feature.

securityScanRetries.description: Maximum retries for security scan failures.

changes.description: List of changes from the previous manifest version. Used for manifest diffing across versions. Omit or set to empty array for the first manifest version.

from.description: Source checkpoint ID that was changed.

to.description: Target checkpoint ID after the change.

description.description: Human-readable description of what changed and why.

contractRules.description: Machine-executable rules that constrain what the Implementor can and cannot do. Every manifest MUST have at least 3 contract rules per file being modified.

checkpoints.description: Ordered list of quality checkpoints that verify the implementation matches the plan. Structural checkpoints first, then behavioral, meta, and acceptance checkpoints.

id.description: Unique identifier for the contract rule following the pattern CR-NNN.

type.description: The category of the contract rule.

severity.description: Severity level of the rule violation. Blocking rules stop the pipeline; warnings are non-blocking.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what the rule enforces.

rule.description: Shell command to execute for verifying the rule (e.g., a grep command).

expectedResult.description: Expected outcome of executing the rule. 'no_matches' means the rule command should find zero results. 'matches_found' means the rule command must find at least one result.

id.description: Unique identifier for the checkpoint following the pattern CP-NNN.

type.description: The category of checkpoint determining what kind of verification is performed.

description.description: Human-readable description of what to verify.

target.description: Relative file path to the file being verified (e.g., 'src/services/user.ts').

dependsOn.description: Array of checkpoint IDs that must pass before this checkpoint can be verified. Expresses ordering dependencies.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Optional acceptance criteria string describing the condition that must be met for this checkpoint to pass.

verify.description: Verification specification. The structure depends on the 'kind' field, which determines which additional fields are required.

kind.description: The type of verification to perform.

exportName.description: Required when kind is 'exportExists'. The name of the export to verify.

className.description: Required when kind is 'classExists' or 'methodExists'. The class name to verify.

functionName.description: Required when kind is 'functionExists'. The function name to verify.

methodName.description: Required when kind is 'methodExists', 'handlesError', or 'validatesInput'. The method name to verify.

typeName.description: Required when kind is 'typeExists'. The type or interface name to verify.

routePath.description: Required when kind is 'routeExists' or 'hasMiddleware'. The API route path (e.g., '/api/users').

method.description: Required when kind is 'routeExists' or 'hasMiddleware'. The HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH).

details.description: Required when kind is 'handlesError'. Description of the error scenario to verify.

level.description: Required when kind is 'logsAtLevel'. The logging level to verify.

middlewareName.description: Required when kind is 'hasMiddleware'. The name of the middleware function to verify.

prompt.description: Required when kind is 'selfReviewCheckpoint'. Description of what the Implementor should self-verify.

verifyMethod.description: Required when kind is 'selfReviewCheckpoint'. The method to use for verification.

given.description: Required when kind is 'acceptanceCriteria'. The precondition or setup for the test scenario.

when.description: Required when kind is 'acceptanceCriteria'. The action or trigger for the test scenario.

then.description: Required when kind is 'acceptanceCriteria'. The expected outcome of the test scenario.

testCommand.description: Required when kind is 'acceptanceCriteria'. Shell command that exits with code 0 on success.

allOf.description: Conditional validation for structural checkpoint kinds requiring additional fields.
Conditional validation for behavioral checkpoint kinds requiring additional fields.
Conditional validation for meta checkpoint kinds requiring additional fields.
Conditional validation for acceptance criteria checkpoint kinds.
